      "Cable car access means the high alpine is available without mountaineering fitness"

      "Optional hiking routes from the terrace for those who want to go further",
      "The closest most people will ever get to a living glacier without climbing gear"

      "Easy to moderate: cable car to 2,978 m; terrace walking is flat",

      "Travellers looking for beaches or low-altitude warmth",
